completed_tasks.name: 02-02: Cloud Storage upload on NDA completion
02-03: Usage counting + free tier limits + upgrade prompt

decisions.decision: writeUserProfile uses check-then-write instead of set({merge:true})
decisions.rationale: Firestore rules block client updates to tier field; merge:true includes tier in affectedKeys even when value unchanged

decisions.decision: atLimit early return moved after all React hooks
decisions.rationale: Original placement before useMemo hooks violated React rules of hooks, causing #300 crash when monthlyUsage changed from 0 to 2

next_action: Commit all Phase 2 work, then plan Phase 3 (NDC + Bilateral NDA Templates — TMPL-01 through TMPL-07)
context_notes: Phase 2 fully verified on iOS simulator. Cloud upload, usage counting, upgrade prompt all working. Phase 3 plans do not exist yet — need to create 03-CONTEXT.md and plan files. Firestore security rules are deployed in Firebase Console (not CLI). Test NDA data exists in Firestore (3 NDAs from this session's testing).
